title: XR's GUI
description: This is a GUI resourcepack that changes the GUI to fit with Minecraft's modern artstyle, while still having a similar feel to the old UI.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a09b628c1abd2609e9bf28b92412a9a95dbe9da0.png)
## This is a GUI resourcepack that changes the GUI to fit with Minecraft's modern artstyle, while still having a similar feel to the old UI.
![recipe book and stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b60058dc74f7a8258536d970b718e30ff086558.png)
![creative inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d47c28fe40692cf9a2605d12d8735572d2c3081f.png)
